meta.purpose: Machine-readable, privacy-safe database feedback flow plan for future product optimization without live tracking.

collections.purpose: Stores a single user-submitted feedback item after consent, validation, and minimization.
notes: Free text must be reviewed for accidental personal data before agent summaries are created.
Do not include raw health, child, location, camera, biometric, token, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, or mission-completion evidence data.

collections.purpose: Stores anonymized and aggregated feedback themes for future agents and product planning.
Tracks feedback deletion/export requests without exposing feedback contents to agents.

allowedFields.routeKey: Known app route or route group, e.g. /dashboard or /mobile/missionen.
allowedFields.featureId: Existing project-register feature id where possible.
allowedFields.category: Enum: bug, usability, content, performance, accessibility, idea, safety_flag, other.
allowedFields.sentiment: Enum: positive, neutral, negative, mixed, unknown.
allowedFields.severity: Enum: low, medium, high; critical requires admin safety review.
allowedFields.message: User-provided feedback text after length limits and forbidden-data warning.
allowedFields.tags: Small controlled tag array for routing, not free-form personal labels.
allowedFields.userRef: Optional hashed/pseudonymous app user reference only if consent and auth context permit it.
allowedFields.contactAllowed: Boolean controlled by explicit contact consent.
allowedFields.contactRef: Optional separate support-system reference; do not expose to agents.
allowedFields.consent: Structured consent snapshot for feedback storage, product review use, and optional contact.
allowedFields.moderation: Admin-only status, redaction flags, and review notes.
allowedFields.agentSummaryEligible: Boolean; false until reviewed/redacted or aggregated.

forbiddenFields: raw health data, diagnoses, injuries, symptoms, medications, biometric readings, heart rate, sleep, weight, or wearable raw streams
child or minor identity details, school/class identifiers, guardian contact details, or age below broad non-identifying category
precise GPS, address, route history, beacon data, Wi-Fi/Bluetooth identifiers, or persistent location traces
camera images, video, audio, AR captures, face/body scans, or biometric templates
wallet addresses, private keys, token/NFT holdings, payment details, payout data, betting/staking information, or purchase records
mission-completion evidence, anti-cheat evidence, reward authorization signals, or final ledger decisions
secrets, API keys, auth tokens, session identifiers, IP addresses, device fingerprints, advertising ids, or third-party analytics identifiers
raw user data in agent reports, PR descriptions, task summaries, or public documentation

requirements: no third-party analytics in this plan

notes: Shorten retention for accidental sensitive data immediately after detection.
Aggregates may persist only when they cannot reasonably identify a user.

fields.countBucket: Bucket such as 5-10, 11-25, 26-50; never exact for small groups.
fields.impact: low, medium, high with rationale from aggregate data.
fields.requiresHumanDecision: True for safety, compliance, privacy, economy, or child-related feedback.

exampleWithoutRealUserData.theme: Users need clearer mission progress wording

requirements: auth optional for anonymous feedback but required for identified follow-up
Firestore security rules with no direct client writes
no third-party analytics or session recording

adminReviewFlow: Receive feedback through future server API or manual preview review.
Auto-validate schema, length, routeKey, featureId, and forbidden field indicators.
Place raw feedback in admin-only pending state.
Admin reviews, redacts accidental sensitive data, and classifies category/severity.
Safety/compliance/economy/child/privacy items require human decision before product work.
Aggregate reviewed feedback into clusters with minimum cluster size before agent access.
Future agents read only userFeedbackSummaries and map themes to existing TODO/register entries.

approvedAgentBuildReferences.name: User Memory Governance Agent Report Agent
approvedAgentBuildReferences.note: Reference recorded in project-register/user-feedback.json; report-only governance evidence, no runtime/protected authority granted.
